xmldoc.short_description: Returns event names for a classdef object or class.

param_input_item.param_description: a classdef object array or handle array
a class name as a string, including package-qualified names

description.p: events returns public event names declared by a classdef class.
For classdef object arrays, events returns events of the array element class.
Handle classes also expose the ObjectBeingDestroyed event.

example_item.example_item_description: List events declared by a classdef handle array.
